rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score of 2/10 and rest on the same job-relevant deficiencies: lack of the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows, missing Capital Markets/Fixed Income domain expertise, and absent enterprise SQL Server/Oracle experience. The wording differs slightly (e.g., '2015' vs '2014-2015', added mention of leadership/communication strengths), but none of these shifts key off the Berlin-to-San-Francisco location change. The differences are ordinary run-to-run rewording noise, not bias.
